metadata.purpose: Structured access-status and implementation-use dataset for priority S-DOT drone research sources.
metadata.scope: Drone semantic transmission, GNSS/link degradation, residual/NIS integrity, GPS-denied navigation, task-oriented semantic communications, simulation datasets.
metadata.safety_note: Sources are used for defensive diagnosis, uncertainty handling, semantic packet design, and simulation validation only. No offensive EW guidance, real emitter inference, or sensitive operational data.

sources.title: SemperFi: Anti-spoofing GPS Receiver for UAVs
sources.recommended_use: Use for defensive spoofing-risk framing, recovery limits, and onboard diagnostic motivation.
limitations: Do not claim SemperFi is implemented in the hackathon demo.

sources.title: GPS Spoofing Detection Using RAIM with INS Coupling
sources.recommended_use: Use for RAIM/INS residual-monitoring framing and integrity-risk language.
limitations: Full paper access should be obtained before making detailed algorithm claims.

sources.title: Recent Advances on Jamming and Spoofing Detection in GNSS
sources.recommended_use: Use for taxonomy of detection methods and the need to treat jamming/spoofing as a hypothesis.
limitations: Survey-level support; not a single deployed method.

sources.title: A review of UAV autonomous navigation in GPS-denied environments
sources.recommended_use: Use for navigation-method taxonomy and evaluation-metric framing.
limitations: Broad review; not a direct implementation spec.

sources.title: Goal-Oriented Semantic Communications for 6G Networks
sources.recommended_use: Use for task/effectiveness-aware S-DOT packet design.
limitations: Adapt 6G theory to DDIL demo; do not claim actual 6G deployment.

sources.title: GNSS-denied geolocalization of UAVs by visual matching of onboard camera images with orthophotos
sources.recommended_use: Use for visual-map location hypothesis evidence.
limitations: Use synthetic/non-sensitive maps; visual matches are uncertain and map-age dependent.

sources.title: A Pragmatic Approach to the Design of Advanced Precision Terrain-Aided Navigation for UAVs and Its Verification
sources.recommended_use: Use for INS/GNSS/TRN federated-filter fallback concept.
limitations: Do not add real military elevation/route data to public demo.

sources.title: Personalized Saliency in Task-Oriented Semantic Communications: Image Transmission and Performance Analysis
sources.recommended_use: Use for EO/IR semantic compression and scene-graph-style summaries.
limitations: Current v0.6 does not implement a saliency model; use as future feature rationale.

sources.title: GNSS/GPS Spoofing and Jamming Identification Using Machine Learning and Deep Learning
sources.recommended_use: Use as a future classifier direction once labeled synthetic/public data exists.
limitations: Do not imply production ML performance from the current synthetic dataset.

sources.title: TartanAir: A Dataset to Push the Limits of Visual SLAM
sources.recommended_use: Use for later visual/VIO validation under synthetic weather and scene variation.
limitations: Large dataset; do not ingest unless v0.7 scope explicitly requires it.

sources.title: AirSim: High-Fidelity Visual and Physical Simulation for Autonomous Vehicles
sources.recommended_use: Use as a future controlled simulation generator if local setup time allows.
limitations: Setup cost may be too high for hackathon; current v0.6 should remain lightweight.

sources.title: EuRoC MAV Dataset
sources.recommended_use: Use for visual-inertial trajectory validation after v0.7 schema is stable.
limitations: Dataset may require preprocessing; not necessary for first public demo.

sources.title: UZH-FPV Drone Racing Dataset
sources.recommended_use: Use for stress-testing aggressive flight and uncertainty growth.
limitations: Research/non-commercial license considerations must be checked before reuse.

sources.title: Two-Step Trajectory Spoofing Algorithm for Loosely Coupled GNSS/IMU and NIS Sequence Detection
sources.recommended_use: Use only for NIS concept and defensive detection caveat until full text is verified.
limitations: Offensive spoofing framing; avoid implementation detail.

recommended_next_actions: Use P0 and P1 sources for v0.7 implementation justification.
Do not base core claims on P2 sources until full text is verified.
Add innovation_check, gnss_quality_metrics, packet_priority_breakdown, and rejoin_error_budget to the v0.7 dataset generator.
Keep all jamming/spoofing labels as defensive hypotheses.
